generated_oml:
instance AmbientTemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer for ambient temperature measurement (-55°C to +125°C, ±0.5°C accuracy)"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance InternalTemperatureSensor1 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer for internal temperature measurement (position 1)"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance InternalTemperatureSensor2 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer for internal temperature measurement (position 2)"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom AmbientTemperatureSensor, InternalTemperatureSensor1, InternalTemperatureSensor2
]

instance TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature readings from three DS18S20 sensors via 1-Wire bus"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RabbitMQBroker
]

instance ThermalModelA : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Thermal model with two parameters: C_air and G_box"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ParameterCalibrationService, ThermalSimulationService
]

instance ThermalModelB : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Thermal model with four parameters: C_heater, C_air, G_heater, G_box"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ParameterCalibrationService, ThermalSimulationService
]

instance HeatbedActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Heatbed (214×214×3 mm) controlled via Raspberry Pi GPIO through PCB with MOSFETs (4A handling) and optocouplers"
]

instance FanActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Fan (airflow 0.02 m³/s) controlled via Raspberry Pi GPIO through PCB with MOSFETs and optocouplers"
]

instance StyrofoamBox : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Insulated styrofoam box with volume 0.03 m³"
]

instance RaspberryPi4ModelB : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B controller for system operation"
]

instance PCBWithMOSFETsAndOptocouplers : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "PCB with MOSFETs (handling 4A current) and optocouplers for electrical isolation"
]

instance PowerSupply : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Power supply for thermal incubator system"
]

instance RabbitMQBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ message broker for real-time temperature data transmission"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, ParameterCalibrationService, FaultDetectionService, OperationAdjustmentService
]

instance ScipyOptimizationLibrary : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Scipy optimization library for non-linear least squares calibration"
    DTDFVocab:enables ParameterCalibrationService
]

instance GitHubCodeRepository : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "GitHub-hosted open-source code repository for digital twin implementation"
    DTDFVocab:enables ThermalSimulationService, RealTimeMonitoringService, ParameterCalibrationService, FaultDetectionService, OperationAdjustmentService
]

instance ThermalSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation and prediction of thermal behavior using calibrated models"
    DTDFVocab:provides ThermalPredictionInsight
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring for safety and optimal operation"
    DTDFVocab:provides SafetyMonitoringInsight, OptimalOperationInsight
]

instance ParameterCalibrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Parameter calibration via non-linear least squares optimization (Scipy)"
    DTDFVocab:provides ParameterCalibrationAction
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Fault detection based on model predictions"
    DTDFVocab:provides ViolationDetectedInsight
]

instance OperationAdjustmentService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Adjust physical twin operations in response to detected violations"
    DTDFVocab:provides OperationAdjustmentAction
]

instance ThermalPredictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Prediction of thermal behavior from simulation"
]

instance SafetyMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight about safety conditions of thermal incubator"
]

instance OptimalOperationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight about optimal operation of thermal incubator"
]

instance ViolationDetectedInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detected violation of safety or operational limits"
]

instance ParameterCalibrationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Update model parameters based on sensor data via non-linear least squares optimization"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance OperationAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjust physical twin operations in response to detected violations"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance ThermalIncubatorSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Thermal incubator system regulating internal temperature regardless of content"
    base:contains StyrofoamBox, HeatbedActuator, FanActuator, RaspberryPi4ModelB, PCBWithMOSFETsAndOptocouplers, PowerSupply, AmbientTemperatureSensor, InternalTemperatureSensor1, InternalTemperatureSensor2
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Controller sends heating/fan control commands via RabbitMQ to the low-level driver, which actuates the heatbed and fan using MOSFETs based on bang-bang control logic with configurable lower/upper temperature limits (LL/UL), heating duration (H), and waiting duration (C)."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestrated components include RabbitMQ communication server, low-level driver (sensor/actuator interface), controller (bang-bang logic), and simulation models; interconnected via RabbitMQ for bidirectional data flow between physical and virtual components."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "As operated phase, as the digital twin integrates models after the physical system is deployed for ongoing monitoring and prediction."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Model B validated as superior for predicting heatbed thermal inertia; calibration minimizes residual error via Scipy optimization; assumptions tested through sensor placement experiments showing temperature discrepancies up to 7°C without optimized fan voltage (18V reduced discrepancy to 6°C)."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ protocol for message passing between controller, low-level driver, and simulation models; RabbitMQ server runs on Raspberry Pi for local synchronization."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ server and all DT components (controller, low-level driver) deployed on Raspberry Pi 4 Model B hardware."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Safe protocol incorporated into low-level driver to maintain device safety; controller enforces temperature limits (LL/UL) to prevent unsafe operating conditions."
]
